item.title: Diesel boost on the water for bottlenecked Queensland regions
item.description: Regional servos are expected to receive extra fuel as authorities scramble to ease mounting pressure on supplies.

item.title: Troubled singer Britney Spears talks of ‘emotional issues’ after arrest over reckless driving
item.description: ‘This year has been quite interesting.’

item.title: Champion jockey James McDonald equals 45-year-old record with latest Group 1 triumph
item.description: The superstar has added yet another accolade to his growing list.

item.title: Cristian Volpato headlines Socceroos’ World Cup squad after dramatic last-ditch switch
item.description: The 22-year-old has vaulted right into the mix for a start but there was fresh heartbreak for a heart-and-soul veteran.

item.title: Mary Fowler’s Manchester City win FA Cup title on emotional day for Brighton’s Aussie coach Dario Vidosic
item.description: The Matildas star lifted the trophy on a day her opponent’s Australian coach and his late father were in everyone’s hearts.

item.title: Olympic stadium build to begin on Victoria Park as protests continue
item.description: The construction will go ahead despite protestors swarming the Brisbane park in a last-ditch effort.

item.title: Much-loved Socceroo Martin Boyle releases short statement after World Cup heartbreak
item.description: The 33-year-old’s World Cup dreams have been crushed for a second time.

item.title: SA budget: Treasurer Tom Koutsantonis to unveil a modest budget as state’s finances take a hit
item.description: Treasurer Tom Koutsantonis faces soaring costs, rising debt and major infrastructure pressures.

item.title: Australians urged to shop around as specialists charge thousands more for surgery
item.description: New data shows some specialists are charging patients thousands more than others for common procedures.

item.title: La La Land composer Justin Hurwitz praises Sydney student Sterling Nasa after saving concert performance at Darling Harbour Theatre
item.description: ‘Not bad for a Saturday night’.

item.title: Residents and tourists rattled by double explosion at Maltese fireworks factory
item.description: Shocking footage circulating online captured the moment the 1.9 magnitude blast shook the surrounding area.

item.title: Iran-US peace negotiations falter as ceasefire on shaky ground
item.description: Ongoing peace talks hinge on Israel and Hezbollah maintaining a precarious ceasefire agreement.

item.title: Cost-of-living crisis pushes foster carers to breaking point: ‘Should not have to fight for shoes and clothing’
item.description: Desperate families say the few hundred dollars they get each week is nowhere near enough to give children the lives they deserve.

item.title: Patagonia launches trademark lawsuit against drag queen and activist Pattie Gonia
item.description: In January, the company launched a trademark infringement lawsuit against Pattie Gonia.

item.title: Federal government sanctions extremist West Bank settler farms in response to ongoing violence
item.description: ‘The individuals and entities sanctioned today have undermined Israel’s own security and its standing in the world.’

item.title: ‘Disastrous’ prediction for thousands of new homeowners amid market downturn
item.description: ‘For those that have recently bought, it’s a very real danger.’

item.title: Santorini: Woman causes outrage after spreading loved one’s ashes through busy streets of tourist hotspot
item.description: Locals are up in arms over the incident described as a ‘health bomb’ by a furious official.

item.title: Consumer watchdog investigates online sales of potentially deadly magnetic toys at Amazon, eBay, Kogan
item.description: Banned items have been found in a range of toys sold by major retailers.

item.title: Tennis icon John McEnroe counting down until to return home from French Open ahead of NBA Finals
item.description: ‘The time has come. I’ve been waiting only 53 years.’

item.title: Seven dead including gunman after series of shootings in Muscatine, Iowa
item.description: A preliminary investigation indicated the killings ‘stemmed from a domestic-related dispute’.

item.title: Residents feared trapped under rubble as Kyiv homes targeted in major Russian strikes
item.description: Dozens of people including children have been wounded in the large-scale attack.

item.title: Jockey Kristy Bennett seriously injured in horrific fall at Gold Coast trials
item.description: The 29-year-old has been rushed to hospital after her horse crossed the line and collapsed.

item.title: Allen’s lolly iNSiDE OUTS recalled nationwide after plastic found in some packets
item.description: Eating the recalled snack could cause illness or injury.

item.title: Migraine prevention drug Emgality put on the Pharmaceutical Benefits Scheme, now hundreds of dollars cheaper
item.description: One woman was previously forced to ditch the treatment and rely only on Botox injections because of the cost.

item.title: Seven unveils golden Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games broadcast team
item.description: Much-loved icon Bruce McAvaney will lead the team that boasts 34 Comm Games medals.

item.title: Middle East war: President Donald Trump denies halting of US-Iran peace deal amid Lebanon strikes, as Mark Rubio reveals nuclear budging in
item.description: ‘The conversations between us have been going on continuously’

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife 2026: Jason shares realities of juggling farm work and being a dad
item.description: ‘That has been a big thing in my past dating history.’

item.title: Caroline Wilson recounts how an accidental text message exposed the Melbourne Demons tanking scandal
item.description: ‘Sometimes you just get lucky.’

item.title: Warning over common wet weather driving mistake that can cost Aussie drivers thousands
item.description: There are significantly more fines issued for the infraction in winter than summer.

item.title: Pat Cummins pokes fun at Melbourne Stars after BBL merger news
item.description: The shake-up may have stunned the cricket world, but the Aussie Test captain can see a funny side.

item.title: Consumer groups demand crackdown on dangerous products that look like toys sold by online retail giants
item.description: They look harmless, even cute but banned and dangerous products are flooding Australia's biggest online marketplaces.

item.title: Aryna Sabalenka’s French Open hopes blown away in stunning quarter-final loss to Diana Shnaider
item.description: The world No.1 was full of emotion when she spoke to reporters about her stunning quarter-final boilover.

item.title: Kuwait International Airport hit in deadly strike as US and Iran trade fire in biggest night of Middle East war since April ceasefire
item.description: Flights have been suspended as terrifying vision of the attack emerges.

item.title: Heartbreaking scenes as much-loved star Matteo Berrettini retires hurt at French Open
item.description: The fan favourite was in tears as he eventually pulled the pin in the second set.

item.title: Scientists in WA map the universe’s magnetic fields bringing colour to invisible forces from galaxies far, far away
item.description: Striking maps produced with the help of a powerful radio telescope in the Australian outback will help scientists better understand how the Milky Way formed.

item.title: Ceasefire reached: Israel and Lebanon agree to terms contingent on steps by Hezbollah
item.description: The US-mediated agreement hinges on a complete cessation of fire from the Lebanese militia

item.title: Notorious former Nippers coach and convicted paedophile Peter Liddy walks free from jail
item.description: The 83-year-old former magistrate spent 25 years behind bars.

item.title: Elderly couple fighting for life after man fends off alleged home intruder
item.description: A 75-year-old man has been hailed as a hero, with a senior police officer labelling his actions as ‘quite impressive’.

item.title: Australia’s worst packaging offenders named in Unpackit Awards
item.description: Cafes and major supermarkets have been called out in the worst packaging awards.

item.title: New York Knicks stage epic comeback to take Game 1 of NBA Finals
item.description: The visitors trailed by 14 points at one stage in the second half.

item.title: Iconic Big Potato saved for now after NSW council rejects supermarket expansion plans
item.description: The oversized landmark has divided locals for decades, attracting tourists, ridicule and a cult following alike.

item.title: ‘Lives within its means’: SA Budget hands families relief while hospital construction costs blowout looms
item.description: Who are the winners and losers as Labor delivers a ‘conservative’ financial plan.

item.title: Scientists bake sourdough using 5300-year-old yeast from ancient mummy Otzi the Iceman
item.description: Researchers have their eye on a popular beverage for their next experiment.

item.title: Mike Smithson: The ‘no surprises’ South Australian budget that surprised no one
item.description: Budget papers revealed surpluses were up and debt is exploding.

item.title: Aussie GP reveals signs of silent killer after suffering heart attack at her desk
item.description: An Aussie GP has issued a warning about the vague signs that could save your life.

item.title: On a hunt for gold, one survivor recounts his days stuck in cramped, flooded Laos cave
item.description: ‘I only thought, I want to eat. I want to eat raw beef with spicy dip. I had to have it.’

item.title: Hezbollah rejects US-backed ceasefire terms with Israel in strongly-worded statement
item.description: The militia emphatically rejected the terms of the agreement insisting ‘resistance will continue’.

item.title: Employees injured after plane’s nose gear collapses at Frankfurt airport
item.description: Footage circulating online captured the shocking moment the front supports of a Lufthansa plane unexpectedly gave way.

item.title: Popular Thermos product recalled after multiple people blinded
item.description: The item was sold for over a decade at retailers including Big W, Bunnings and Target.

item.title: Polish qualifier Maja Chwalinska to face Mirra Andreeva in French Open final
item.description: The 24-year-old was in a playful mood after making the final, poking fun at a reporter and spilling on her own team.

item.title: Australia fall apart in ODI decider against Pakistan
item.description: It was a dire day from the Australians and it ended up costing them the series.

item.title: England bowler Ollie Robinson wastes New Zealand on first day of Lord’s Test
item.description: ‘I still can’t really put it into words.’

item.title: Aussie No.1 Maya Joint’s difficult retirement admission amid six-month losing streak
item.description: The 20-year-old has owned up to ‘a momentary lack of judgement’ after losing to a player ranked 243 places below her.

item.title: Former prince Andrew spotted with large bruise on his cheek
item.description: The disgraced royal has been under intense scrutiny since his February arrest.

item.title: Toyota and Lexus recall thousands of vehicles over software error
item.description: The defect ‘may increase the risk of an accident causing injury or death’.

item.description: This assault marks the second attack in a week on local health workers in the region.

item.description: The Middle East attack killed one and injured dozens more.

item.description: The royal drew from her own diagnosis to comfort the young mother.

item.description: The pro-wrestler turned actor responded to the comments with his own hilarious video.

item.description: ‘Now we play the waiting game.’

item.description: The news follows the actor’s engagement to Olivia Lewis in January.

item.description: Xavier Coates was close to returning from Achilles surgery but now won’t be seen until next year.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Ricky Stuart fuming after Canberra Raiders go scoreless against Sydney Roosters
item.description: The Canberra coach was in no mood for a chat after his team hit a two-year low.

item.title: Child predator jailed in Tasmania for using social media to trick minors into sending sexual content
item.description: The 34-year-old offered money, vapes and a PlayStation to obtain hundreds of horrific videos.

item.title: Anthony Head, star of Buffy the Vampire Slayer and Ted Lasso, dies just months after his wife’s death
item.description: His daughters have since spoken out about their ‘extraordinary father’.

item.title: Australian racing driver Joey Mawson cleared of raping Michael Schumacher nurse
item.description: The nurse has issued a statement after a court cleared Joey Mawson of all charges.

item.title: Which electrified ute should you buy?
item.description: Electrification has hit Australia's ute market and there are now several hybrid, PHEV and EV options available, but which is best?

item.title: 2026 CarExpert Choice winner: Best Electrified Ute
item.description: The GWM Cannon Alpha PHEV offers a superb mix of genuine electric range, on-road comfort, and off-road capability.

item.title: Australia may be falling out of love with 4x4 utes
item.description: After a decade of the Toyota HiLux and Ford Ranger topping sales charts, new data shows four-wheel drive ute demand is down 18 per cent this year.

item.title: Western Bulldogs comeback kid Cody Weightman reduced to tears moments before clash with Hawthorn
item.description: ‘I started reading it and I started crying.’

item.title: Toyota Corolla Cross ute spied in Brazil
item.description: Toyota is prepping a small monocoque ute in South America to take on established models from Fiat and Chevrolet.

item.title: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic urges AI pause due to rapid advances in the technology
item.description: The team behind Claude say the rapid advances in artificial intelligence could soon break free of needing humans.

item.title: Australian Olympic hero Jess Fox wins gold as stunning K1 return continues
item.description: The much-loved Aussie’s remarkable return from kidney surgery has just taken another big step.

item.title: Tenterfield Mayor throws her support behind Blessing couple after alleged home invasion
item.description: The alleged attack on the elderly couple has reignited debate about how much power people have to defend themselves in their own homes.

item.title: Melbourne’s possible nickname for new BBL team send fans into meltdown
item.description: ‘Why are they complicating it?’

item.title: Australian nurse reveals why she dipped into her superannuation to pay for weight-loss surgery
item.description: The 69-year-old was left with chronic pain after spending a lifetime on her feet helping patients. Then a conversation with a colleague gave her the solution.

item.title: Hawthorn call out racist abuse aimed at Mabior Chol: ‘Vile and appalling’
item.description: The club and the AFL have both issued strong statements, while an investigation is on the way.

item.title: NSW Police plea for public help as four girls vanish from Western Sydney over a fortnight
item.description: Two of the girls are ‘known to each other’ and went missing on the same night however all cases aren’t believed to be linked.

item.title: Australian Football Hall of Fame needs urgent audit as names from the past keep rolling in
item.description: The problem is abundantly obvious and something has to urgently change.

item.title: Two hospitalised after truck rollover sparks shutdown of Princes Freeway in Melbourne
item.description: Debris from the B-double fell from the bridge and struck an unlucky car passing at the wrong time.

item.title: Zinc Airlines: How a hopeful new carrier will try to buck the trend of belly-up budget Australian fliers
item.description: The carrier will base itself out of Western Sydney International Airport and is hoping to learn from others who failed trying to break into the ruthless Aussie market.

item.title: Norwegian crown princess to continue University of Sydney studies at home due to mother’s failing health
item.description: The Norwegian royal made a frantic dash home after her mother’s health deteriorated.

item.title: Appeal rejected for double murderer Daniel Holdom who murdered mother, dumped toddler in suitcase
item.description: The infamous killings saw a young mother murdered and her toddler’s body dumped in a suitcase.

item.title: Socceroos star Connor Metcalfe hits out at USA pundits ahead of World Cup: ‘So much rubbish’
item.description: The gun midfielder is sick of the talk coming from the World Cup hosts.

item.title: Man dies after shark attack off coast of Albany, Western Australia
item.description: The 35-year-old was swimming off the coast of the Australian nature reserve when he was viciously mauled.

item.title: Murder charge after man dies in driveway following ‘serious’ alleged assault in Tweed Heads, NSW
item.description: ‘It’s a serious matter and someone has lost their life.’

item.title: Records tumble as Fremantle open up ‘old scars’ in biggest ever win over North Melbourne
item.description: The Dockers kicked an extraordinary 19 consecutive goals en route to their biggest ever victory.

item.title: Celebrity couple Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding venue revealed
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly set to wed over the July 4 holiday weekend.

item.title: Fireball Miss storms home to claim threeling Queensland Oaks
item.description: The three-year-old became the fourth horse in past 25 years to claim a rare double.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Liberal MP Phil Thompson stared death in the face. Now he’s ramping up his political fight for veterans
item.description: Politician Phil Thompson has revealed the moment his life changed forever.

item.title: Brazen daylight shooting as bullets sprayed outside slain crime boss’ memorial in Punchbowl
item.description: Family had gathered to begin their farewells after the body of a man allegedly murdered in Vietnam arrived home.

item.title: Melbourne teacher's brother charged with murder after Sunil Sharma’s disappearance in India
item.description: ‘Anyone who’s met my dad will say he is intelligent, strong and funny, but he is also loving and sensitive.’

item.title: Family of alleged home invader accused of stabbing elderly couple in NSW Torrington property speaks out
item.description: ‘The events of that evening had just left me absolutely floored.’

item.title: Alastair Clarkson attributes ‘dreadful’ loss to Fremantle to break in routine during bye round
item.description: The Kangaroos coach felt a bit of ‘shame’ after watching his side capitulate to a 124-point loss.

item.title: Billionaire entrepreneur Adrian Portelli to bring discount petrol scheme to South Australia
item.description: One state’s fuel market is set for a major shake-up.

item.title: Selwyn Cobbo scores twice as Dolphins continue climb up ladder with big win over Cowboys
item.description: The Dolphins were a class above in an entertaining battle.

item.title: Rising star Logan Morris boots career-high as Lions return to form
item.description: The 21-year-old could have kicked 10, but still had a night out in the QClash.
